events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: flanged joints, no torque marks/witness lines. This indicates bolts not torqued per spec. At rough-complete stage, flanged joints should have torque witness marks. Missing torque marks = non-compliant/installed-defective. Decision: fail. Risk: medium-high (leak potential).
